summary: Implemented Stage 9C guarded insight update workflow with deterministic markdown rendering, stable-anchor idempotent apply behavior, validation-before-write CLI handling, promotion criteria/provenance output, and focused tests.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insight_updates.py tests/test_insight_cli.py tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 342 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

A local helper or CLI consumes Stage 9A/.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/insight_updates.py renders validated InsightRecord values into a deterministic markdown block with stable markers, confidence, scope, evidence, supersedes, next action, promotion criteria, and provenance sections; tests/test_insight_updates.py covers these fields.

The update workflow can run against temp.evidence: apply_insight_update replaces an existing block identified by a hash-backed stable anchor and tests/test_insight_updates.py asserts repeated application leaves one block and returns changed=False on the second run.

Invalid insight payloads fail before any.evidence: The insight-update CLI loads and validates the JSON payload before calling apply_insight_update; tests/test_insight_updates.py creates planning and insight sentinels and asserts invalid payload failure leaves both unchanged and creates no new files.

Focused tests cover valid render/apply b.evidence: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insight_updates.py tests/test_insight_cli.py tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider passed with render, apply, idempotence, invalid rollback, and CLI JSON-output coverage.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 9C guarded insight update workflow diff.

risks: The workflow applies to explicit operator-selected markdown files; automatic insight-file selection remains future knowledge-graph-updater work.
Skill promotion and golden-eval wiring remain future Stage 9 slices.
Live Codex Exec remains disabled for this worker run because local Codex CLI preflight is still unavailable in this environment.
follow_up_tasks: Shape the next Stage 9 slice for skill promotion or golden-eval wiring now that durable insight writes exist.
Use insight-update from knowledge-graph-updater once the updater is wired to validated InsightRecord payloads.
Continue to Stage 10 Codex local-state adapter work after the Stage 9 learning loop is intentionally closed.
handoff_notes: Stage 9C adds insight_updates.py and the insight-update CLI. The workflow validates an InsightRecord JSON payload before rendering or applying a stable-anchor markdown block with provenance and promotion criteria, and tests prove idempotence plus invalid-payload no-write behavior.
